export const validateFormData=(email,password)=>{console.log("inside validateFormData : ".concat(email," , ").concat(password));if(email===""&&password==="")return"Please enter email Id and password for login";const emailPattern=/^[a-z0-9]+@[a-z]+\.[a-z]{2,3}$/;const passwordPattern=/^(?=.*\d)(?=.*[a-z])(?=.*[A-Z])(?=.*[a-zA-Z]).{8,}$/;// Pooja@123
const isValidEmail=emailPattern.test(email);const isValidPassword=passwordPattern.test(password);if(!isValidEmail)return"Email ID is not correct";if(!isValidPassword)return"Password is not correct";return null;};
